description: Customer asks for a full refund on a high-value order that exceeds the workspace refund cap. Ideal behavior is to escalate rather than refund or auto-decline. Advisory: routing this to a human is irreducibly model judgment (an over-cap refund cannot execute regardless - static-policy blocks it and classifyHomePlan forces needs_review - and an auto-decline reply is indistinguishable from a normal info reply at the classification layer). Tracked as a quality signal, not gated.

messages.contentText: Order #1012 - the leather bag is damaged on arrival. I want a full refund of $200.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their refund request.
